personas.name: The Learner
personas.goal: Understand fundamental branding concepts and terminology.
personas.focus: Clarity, educational value, glossaries, clear headings, easy navigation.

personas.name: The Academic
personas.goal: Find rigorous, cited sources for research papers and projects.
personas.focus: Citations, authorship, publication dates, depth of analysis, methodology.

personas.name: The Manager
personas.goal: Apply branding concepts to current business challenges.
frustrations: Too much theory, not enough practice
personas.focus: Case studies, practical frameworks, ROI arguments, implementation guides.

personas.name: The Consultant
personas.goal: Stay ahead of trends and find data to support client recommendations.
personas.focus: Unique insights, latest trends, proprietary data, expert opinions, white papers.

personas.name: The Brand Manager
personas.goal: Find tools and strategies to manage and grow their specific brand.
frustrations: Abstract concepts that don't translate to daily work
Lack of templates or actionable tools
personas.focus: Templates, tools, actionable strategies, community insights, competitor analysis.
